concept: Would you craft a game where players manage an intergalactic postal service delivering mail between wildly different planetary civilizations? Navigate complex interstellar routes while dealing with space pirates, gravitational anomalies, and bureaucratic customs officials at each port. Upgrade your ships and recruit specialized crew members capable of handling deliveries to extreme environments from gas giants to neutron stars. Unravel a conspiracy hidden in seemingly innocent mail parcels that could threaten the peace of the entire galaxy.
